**Do not edit this copy.** Cliros was extracted to a standalone repo on
2026-05-30:

**→ https://github.com/ajantoniou/cliros**  (local: `/Applications/DrAntoniou Projects/Cliros/`)

Make all Cliros changes in the new repo, not here.
